<!-- Thanks for contributing to @drasi/lib! Please fill out the sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Part of #123". PRs should generally reference an issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / release tooling
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I have added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed (e.g. `docs/api-reference.md`, `README.md`)
- [ ] All commits are signed off (DCO — `git commit -s`)
